description: Composition:Grey round neck, half sleeved t-shirt in 100% cotton with graphic on the frontWash Care:1.Light machine wash2.Do not scrub, bleach or dry clean3.Dry and warm iron on reverseFitting:Regular FitIf you are the type of guy who likes to be laid back and blend in with the crowd, then this distressed look tee from lee is perfect for you. With the subtle colouring and the cool graphics, you would create quite a few double takes when you go out.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
